revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23993722414|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: [[ja:弥彦神社 (札幌市)]] __NOTOC__ {{Infobox religious building| | 名称 = {{ill|Iyahiko Shrine|ja|弥彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyahiko Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 彌彦神社}} | 画像 = [[File: Iyahiko Shrine of Sapporo.JPG|260px]] | 所在地 = {{ill|Hokkaido|en|Hokkaido|qid=Q35581|lt=Hokkaido|1=Hokkaido}} {{ill|Sapporo|en|Sapporo|qid=Q37951|lt=Sapporo City|1=Sapporo}} {{ill|Chūō Ward (Sapporo)|ja|中央区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūō Ward (Sapporo)|1=Chūōku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q20652290}} {{ill|Nakajima Park|en|Nakajima Park|qid=Q5371866|lt=Nakajima Park|1=Nakajima Park}} 1-8 | 祭神 = {{ill|Ameno Kaguyama-no-mikoto|ja|天香山命|1=Ame-no-Kaguyama|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ameno Kaguyama-no-mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Kaguyama|qq=}}・{{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane公|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q382005}} | 創建 = {{ill|1912|en|1912|qid=Q2077|lt=1912|1=1912}}（the 45th year of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}}） January | 本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684|lt=Nagare-zō|1=Nagare-zukuri}} | 社格 = {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|qid=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} | 例祭 = {{ill|July 27|en|July 27|qid=Q2719|lt=July 27|1=July 27}} | 別名 = {{ill|Iyahiko Shrine|ja|伊夜日子神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyahiko Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弥彦神社 (札幌市)}}、{{ill|Sapporo Iyahiko Shrine|ja|札幌彌彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sapporo Iyahiko Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弥彦神社 (札幌市)|1=Iyahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22117940}} | 緯度度 = 43 | 緯度分 = 2 | 緯度秒 = 30.3 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 141 | 経度分 = 21 | 経度秒 = 20.3 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP | 地図 = Sapporo2 | image = File:弥彦（伊夜日子）神社（Yahiko Shrine） - panoramio (2).jpg | location = {{ill|Chuo-ku|qid=Q1079635|1=Chūō-ku, Sapporo}} | coordinates = {{Coord|43.04175|N|141.355639|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Kaguyama|ja|天香山命|zh|天香山命}} | architecture_style = {{ill|nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} }} [[File: Kouta-zuka at Iyahiko Shrine.JPG|thumb|{{ill|Kouta-zuka|ja|小唄塚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kouta-zuka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}]] '''Iyahiko Shrine''' is a Shinto shrine located at 1-8 Nakajima Park, Chūō Ward, {{ill|Sapporo|en|Sapporo|qid=Q37951|lt=Sapporo City|1=Sapporo}}, {{ill|Hokkaido|en|Hokkaido|qid=Q35581|lt=Hokkaido|1=Hokkaido}}. Its former shrine Ranking under the modern system was that of a Gōsha. == Worshipped deities == ; {{ill|Ameno Kaguyama-no-mikoto|ja|天香山命|1=Ame-no-Kaguyama|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ameno Kaguyama-no-mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Kaguyama|qq=}} : The deity of frontier development in {{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|qid=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture|1=Niigata Prefecture}}; the enshrined deity of Iyahiko Shrine.{{Cite web |url=http://jinja.tokyolovers.jp/hokkaido/sapporo/iyahikojinja |title=札幌彌彦神社（弥彦神社、伊夜日子神社） |access-date= |publisher= }} ; {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane公|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q382005}} : The deity of scholarship, also enshrined at {{ill|Dazaifu Tenmangū|en|Dazaifu Tenmangū|qid=Q710786|lt=Dazaifu Tenmangū|1=Dazaifu Tenmangū}}. == History == * In {{ill|1912|en|1912|qid=Q2077|lt=1912|1=1912}} (the 45th year of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}}) – Immigrants from Niigata brought a branch spirit ({{ill|Bunrei|en|Bunrei|qid=Q195793|lt=bunrei|1=Bunrei}}) from {{ill|Yahiko Shrine|en|Yahiko Shrine|qid=Q195684|lt=Matsumae Shrine|1=Yahiko Shrine}} of their hometown and enshrined it at Minami 7-jō Nishi 1-chōme. * In {{ill|1918|en|1918|qid=Q2094|lt=1918|1=1918}} (the 7th year of {{ill|Taishō era|en|Taishō era|qid=Q329174|lt=Taishō|1=Taishō era}}) September – Relocated to the current location. * In {{ill|1922|en|1922|qid=Q2165|lt=1922|1=1922}} (the 11th year of Taishō) – It became a mura-sha. * In {{ill|1938|en|1938|qid=Q18645|lt=1938|1=1938}} (the 13th year of {{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|qid=Q327567|lt=Shōwa|1=Shōwa era}}) – It was elevated to the status of gōsha. * In {{ill|1970|en|1970|qid=Q2474|lt=1970|1=1970}} (the 45th year of Shōwa) July – It received a branch spirit of Sugawara no Michizane from {{ill|Dazaifu Tenmangū|en|Dazaifu Tenmangū|qid=Q710786|lt=Dazaifu Tenmangū|1=Dazaifu Tenmangū}}.[http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01007.html]{{ill|Iyahiko Shrine|ja|弥彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyahiko Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 彌彦神社}} ({{ill|Hokkaido Shrine Administration|ja|北海道神社庁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokkaido Shrine Administration|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神社庁|1=Jinjachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11590703}}) == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『札幌の寺社』, {{ill|Sapporo Bunko|ja|さっぽろ文庫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sapporo Bunko|1=Sapporo Bunko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11268025}} 39 == External Links == * [http://www.iyahiko.or.jp/] (Official Website) * [http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01007.html] ({{ill|Hokkaido Shrine Administration|ja|北海道神社庁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokkaido Shrine Administration|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神社庁|1=Jinjachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11590703}}) == See Also == * {{ill|Sapporo Gokoku Shrine|ja|札幌護国神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sapporo Gokoku Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Taga Shrine (Sapporo)|ja|多賀神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taga Shrine (Sapporo)|1=Taga shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11431089}} {{translated page|ja|弥彦神社 (札幌市)|version=68269324|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:弥彦神社 (札幌市)]] [[ja:弥彦神社]] {{Commons category|Iyahiko-jinja (Sapporo)}} {{wikidata link|Q22117940}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Chūō-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Chuo Ward, Sapporo City]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
